name: @kitchenxpert/ai-modules
description: KitchenXpert AI Modules - Collection of Python-based ML/AI services

scripts.setup:all: pnpm run setup:kitchen-generator && pnpm run setup:compatibility-engine && pnpm run setup:appliance-advisor && pnpm run setup:style-analyzer
scripts.setup:kitchen-generator: cd kitchen-generator && python -m venv venv && venv/Scripts/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:compatibility-engine: cd compatibility-engine && python -m venv venv && venv/Scripts/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:appliance-advisor: cd appliance-advisor && python -m venv venv && venv/Scripts/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:style-analyzer: cd style-analyzer && python -m venv venv && venv/Scripts/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:kitchen-generator:unix: cd kitchen-generator && python -m venv venv && . venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:compatibility-engine:unix: cd compatibility-engine && python -m venv venv && . venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:appliance-advisor:unix: cd appliance-advisor && python -m venv venv && . venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:style-analyzer:unix: cd style-analyzer && python -m venv venv && . venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
